case_title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. BRYAN ABNEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ABNEY, BRYAN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
